title: Most self-contained; "Analytical Memory and Provenance Spine"; 14 new commands
public_claim: Red Team Tranche II is a self-contained analytical-memory and provenance-spine handoff.
distinctive_mechanism: It adds Workspace Depth, Scope Lock, Boundary Console, Assumption Ledger, Session Ledger, and fourteen commands so provenance, assumptions, and room boundaries can survive implementation and reopening.
use_value: It matters because mature red-team review depends on preserving why a challenge was made and what boundary governed it.
